internal compliance note — uae pdpl and disclosure controls for marhaba dunes pjsc
scope: routine board update on disclosure hygiene; references are to public materials (sca rulebook, dfm/adx manuals, adgm/difc data protection guidance).
public status: the sustainability roadmap and 2024 strategy were announced on 15‑02‑2024 via dfm releases; any percentages cited below are sourced from those public documents.
working codename: project coral lantern — internal working title for planning calendars only; not used in any external communication.
embargo: investor‑relations draft for the annual outlook should not be posted before 2026‑01‑20 09:00 gst to align with the planned public webcast.
mac/mae: no material adverse change has been asserted or identified; the pro forma term sheet uses standard, negated mac language from publicly available precedent.
definitive agreements: none are in draft; only a training template based on a public form is circulating for comments in the role mailbox legal@marhabadunes.example.
mnpi filter: do not include non‑public revenue run‑rates, pipeline percentages, or customer names; use placeholders and cite only already‑announced metrics.
pdpl controls: we will not request or store emirates id, family‑origin data, or biometric attributes in the deal room; data minimisation applies to cv placeholders and vendor kyc.
sample form labels (for testing only): emirates id: EID‑9999‑TEST, trade licence: TL‑ADGM‑000000X, investor a/c: ACCT‑0000‑VOID — these are invalid and must not be replaced with real data.
free zone context: filings (if any) will reference adgm/difc framework language but only after the public trigger; no prerelease uploads to dfm/adx portals.
research note hygiene: cite market share figures from public analyst coverage and the sca website; avoid speculative price‑sensitive phrasing.
misc admin (lowercase): move slide deck to the shared drive; schedule team spa‑day vouchers via hr inbox hr@marhabadunes.example; no id uploads to vendors.
inquiries: contact compliance@marhabadunes.example or the sca public helpdesk as listed on its website; do not escalate to external counsel unless the board secretary requests.
